summary: Full regression of Revo México leads app. 21/21 pytest backend tests pass. End-to-end UI flow (landing → form submit → success → admin login → dashboard → search/delete/logout) all pass against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False — fine for current Bearer-token model; tighten to the preview/prod origin before launch.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env. Acceptable for preview, but rotate before going to production.
CSV export accepts the JWT via query string for direct-browser download — be aware the token will land in server access logs; consider a short-lived signed export token in production.
Bcrypt hash starts with $2b$ (verified) and seed_admin updates the password hash when ADMIN_PASSWORD changes — playbook compliant.
SendGrid notification is wired correctly behind a background task and skipped gracefully when SENDGRID_API_KEY is empty (as designed).
test_credentials: admin@revo.mx / Revo2026 (matches /app/memory/test_credentials.md and seeded at startup).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed leads (TEST UTM Lead, TEST Search User, TEST CSV Lead, TEST Delete, etc.). Some remain in MongoDB after the run for inspection. They can be cleaned with: db.leads.deleteMany({name: /^TEST/}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_revo_leads.py. It loads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_revo_leads.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Verified backend endpoints: /api/health, POST /api/leads (with UTM, EmailStr & min_length validation), GET /api/download/report (PDF, %PDF magic + ~application/pdf), POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, GET /api/leads (search, pagination, no _id leak), GET /api/leads/stats, DELETE /api/leads/{id} (200, 400 invalid id, 404 missing), GET /api/leads/export?token=JWT (CSV headers include Nombre, Correo, Telefono, Fecha, utm_source/medium/campaign/term/content, referrer, page_url, ip). UI verified: landing-page, hero-cta, admin-access-link, lead form (lead-name/email/phone/submit/error/success), download-report-btn href points at /api/download/report, /admin guard redirects to /admin/login, login-error on wrong creds, admin-dashboard with stat-total/today/week/phone, search-input, leads-tbody with lead-row, delete-lead-btn (with confirm dialog), refresh-btn, logout-btn, export-csv-btn. Note: HTML5 'required' on lead inputs blocks empty-name from reaching JS validation in normal browsers; the JS validation error string still works correctly once required is bypassed (verified). SendGrid is intentionally not configured — health returns email_configured=false and lead creation still succeeds (verified).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All review_request items pass.
